corrections.currentLabel: Have you EVER illegally accessed or attempted to access any information technology system?
corrections.newLabel: Have you EVER illegally or without authorization modified, destroyed, manipulated, or denied others access to information on any IT system, or introduced a virus or malicious code?
corrections.reason: Field is in Section27_2, not Section27. The currentLabel describes Section 27.1 (unauthorized access). Section 27_2 with 'NO (If NO, proceed to Section 28)' indicates this is a later question in Section 27 about modification/destruction/malware. The label should reflect the actual 27.2/27.3 question.
